/opt/homebrew/opt/lld/bin/ld.lld CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/start.s.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/src/ASM/exceptions.s.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/src/ASM/memory.s.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/src/uart.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/src/exceptionhandler.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/src/lib.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/src/exit.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel.c.obj -o /Users/liuhuachao/Documents/Cline/408/QEMU/bin/kernel.elf -T /Users/liuhuachao/Documents/Cline/408/QEMU/linker.ld -nostdlib
